heading: Conduct of certain public health-related activities
label: 321g Conduct of certain public health-related activities
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 315 of this titlePub. L. 109–295

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: With respect to all public health-related activities to improve State, local, and hospital preparedness and response to chemical, biological, radiological, and nuclear and other emerging terrorist threats carried out by the Department of Health and Human Services (including the Public Health Service), the Secretary of Health and Human Services shall set priorities and preparedness goals and further develop a coordinated strategy for such activities in collaboration with the Secretary.

children.heading: Evaluation of progress
children.label: b Evaluation of progress
children.text: In carrying out subsection (a), the Secretary of Health and Human Services shall collaborate with the Secretary in developing specific benchmarks and outcome measurements for evaluating progress toward achieving the priorities and goals described in such subsection.
